*** Begin Patch
*** Add file: assets/props/tapestry_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for tapestry>
*** Add file: assets/props/wall_shield_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for wall shield>
*** Add file: assets/props/candle_sconce_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for candle sconce>
*** Add file: assets/props/bookshelf_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for bookshelf>
*** Add file: assets/props/barrel_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for barrel>
*** Add file: assets/props/crate_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for crate>
*** Add file: assets/props/rug_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for rug>
*** Add file: assets/props/chandelier_01.png
+<binary pixel art image data for chandelier>
*** Modify file: src/rooms/room_decorator.py
@@ -10,6 +10,30 @@
-def decorate_room(room):
-    # existing decoration logic
-    pass
+import random
+
+PROP_CATALOG = {
+    'dungeon': ['barrel_01', 'crate_01', 'rug_01', 'candle_sconce_01', 'wall_shield_01'],
+    'castle': ['tapestry_01', 'wall_shield_01', 'candle_sconce_01', 'bookshelf_01', 'chandelier_01', 'rug_01'],
+    'library': ['bookshelf_01', 'rug_01', 'candle_sconce_01'],
+    'hall': ['chandelier_01', 'tapestry_01', 'rug_01', 'candle_sconce_01', 'wall_shield_01'],
+}
+
+def decorate_room(room):
+    theme = room.theme
+    props = PROP_CATALOG.get(theme, ['rug_01', 'candle_sconce_01'])
+    count = random.randint(4, 8)
+    selected_props = random.sample(props * 2, count)  # allow repeats if needed
+    room.props = []
+    for prop_name in selected_props:
+        # create prop instance with pixel art sprite
+        prop = {
+            'name': prop_name,
+            'sprite_path': f'assets/props/{prop_name}.png',
+            'position': room.get_random_position(),
+        }
+        room.props.append(prop)
*** End Patch
